tickets.subject: [Atlas seed 09] Login and MFA access issue
tickets.description: I cannot log in after enabling MFA. The code keeps looping back to sign in.

comments.body: I cannot log in after enabling MFA. The code keeps looping back to sign in.
Reset MFA from Admin Settings > Security > Two-factor authentication, then send the user a new invite. If SSO is enforced, confirm the user is assigned to the app in the identity provider.
A member of the support team will get back to you within the next 48 hours.

tickets.subject: [Atlas seed 16] API or webhook integration issue
tickets.description: Webhook delivery is failing with 401 even though the signing secret is copied from settings.

comments.body: Webhook delivery is failing with 401 even though the signing secret is copied from settings.

Use exponential backoff for 429 responses and verify the webhook signature against the raw request body. Rotate exposed keys from Settings > Developers > API keys, then update integrations before revoking the old key.

comments.body: Our API import returns HTTP 429 during the nightly sync. How should we retry safely?

Use exponential backoff for 429 responses and verify the webhook signature against the raw request body. Rotate exposed keys from Settings > Developers > API keys, then update integrations before revoking the old key.
A member of the support team will get back to you within the next 48 hours.

tickets.subject: [Atlas seed 44] Onboarding setup confusion
tickets.description: The setup checklist says connect billing before inviting the team, but our owner is out. Can admins skip that step?

comments.body: The setup checklist says connect billing before inviting the team, but our owner is out. Can admins skip that step?
Admins can invite teammates before billing is connected. Open Workspace Settings > Members, invite the team, then return to Billing before the trial ends.

tickets.subject: [Atlas seed 45] Onboarding setup confusion
tickets.description: I imported a CSV and every row says unmapped. The file has a BOM and semicolon separators from Excel.

comments.body: I imported a CSV and every row says unmapped. The file has a BOM and semicolon separators from Excel.
Save the export as UTF-8 CSV or upload the original file; the importer detects BOMs and semicolon delimiters, then shows mapped columns before processing.
A member of the support team will get back to you within the next 48 hours.

tickets.subject: [Atlas seed 48] HTML-heavy ticket body
tickets.description:
The help-center article has a broken reset password link.

    Error: token_expired
    trace_id=abc123

comments.body:
The help-center article has a broken reset password link.  Error: token_expired
trace_id=abc123
Update the reset-password article link to the current route, then ask the user to request a fresh magic link. Expired tokens cannot be reused.

tickets.subject: [Atlas seed 49] Security review request

comments.body: Procurement needs a SOC 2 report and a data processing addendum before we can renew. Where do we download those?
SOC 2 and DPA files are available from Trust Center after an admin requests access. If the Trust Center link is disabled, contact your account owner.
A member of the support team will get back to you within the next 48 hours.
